title: USEFUL SIGNAL OPERATIONS
summary: This page closes the discussion of energy and power signals with Figure 3.3 and Drill 3.1, which asks the reader to classify x[n] = a^n u[n] based on |a|. It then begins Section 3.2 on useful signal operations, introducing discrete-time shifting and the rule x_s[n] = x[n − 5] along with the general interpretation of right and left shifts.
